_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin deficiency-associated transcriptional dysregulation suggests a novel therapy for tibial pseudoarthrosis in NF1.

_contextSnippet: Using fluorescent-activated flow cytometry, we detected no quantitative increase in ERK activation (phosphorylation) in pseudoarthrosis cells
details: Used for fluorescent-activated flow cytometry analysis of ERK activation in pseudoarthrosis and iliac crest cells
